ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "property_name" TEXT /* Name of the property */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the property (e.g., city, country) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the property */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Star rating of the property */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms available at the property */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the property details were updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pricing_data" (
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pricing record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property the data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the pricing and demand data */,
  "walkup_price" REAL /* Walkup price (price for customers without reservations) */,
  "min_price_offered" REAL /* Minimum price offered for any room */,
  "units_min" INTEGER /* Minimum number of units (rooms) available at the minimum price */,
  "max_price_offered" REAL /* Maximum price offered for any room */,
  "units_max" INTEGER /* Maximum number of units (rooms) available at the maximum price */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the property for the given date */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate for the given date */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions on the given date */,
  "special_events" TEXT /* Special events happening on the given date */,
  "competitor_impact" TEXT /* Impact of competitor pricing on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pricing_data_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, analyst, executive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, modify) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "session_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the user's session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_pricing_id FOREIGN KEY ("pricing_id") REFERENCES pricing_data ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price adjustment */,
  "pricing_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pricing record being adjusted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the adjustment */,
  "adjustment_date" TEXT /* Date of the adjustment */,
  "old_walkup_price" REAL /* Old walkup price before the adjustment */,
  "new_walkup_price" REAL /* New walkup price after the adjustment */,
  "old_min_price_offered" REAL /* Old minimum price offered before the adjustment */,
  "new_min_price_offered" REAL /* New minimum price offered after the adjustment */,
  "old_units_min" INTEGER /* Old minimum number of units available before the adjustment */,
  "new_units_min" INTEGER /* New minimum number of units available after the adjustment */,
  "old_max_price_offered" REAL /* Old maximum price offered before the adjustment */,
  "new_max_price_offered" REAL /* New maximum price offered after the adjustment */,
  "old_units_max" INTEGER /* Old maximum number of units available before the adjustment */,
  "new_units_max" INTEGER /* New maximum number of units available after the adjustment */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the adjustment */,
  "approval_status" TEXT /* Approval status of the adjustment */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the adjustment */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date when the adjustment was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_adjustments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_adjustments_pricing_id FOREIGN KEY ("pricing_id") REFERENCES pricing_data ("pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_adjustments_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_types" (
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room type */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property the room type belongs to */,
  "room_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the room type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the room type */,
  "max_occupancy" INTEGER /* Maximum number of occupants allowed in the room */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available in the room type */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view the room offers (e.g., city, ocean) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_types_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "room_pricing" (
  "room_pricing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each room pricing record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property the room pricing belongs to */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room type the pricing belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the room pricing */,
  "price" REAL /* Price for the room type on the specified date */,
  "base_price" REAL /* Base price of the room type */,
  "discount_rate" REAL /* Discount rate applied to the room type */,
  "final_price" REAL /* Final price after applying discounts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("room_pricing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_pricing_room_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("room_type_id") REFERENCES room_types ("room_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_room_pricing_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupancy_rates" (
  "occupancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupancy record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the property the occupancy data belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the occupancy data */,
  "occupied_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms occupied */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms available */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate as a percentage */,
  "booked_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms booked in advance */,
  "walkup_bookings" INTEGER /* Number of walkup bookings */,
  "no_shows" INTEGER /* Number of no-shows */,
  "cancellations" INTEGER /* Number of cancellations */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_occupancy_rates_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "competitor_data" (
  "competitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each competitor */,
  "competitor_name" TEXT /* Name of the competitor */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the competitor */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the competitor data */,
  "average_price" REAL /* Average price of rooms */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* Number of rooms available */,
  "star_rating" INTEGER /* Star rating of the competitor */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* Amenities available at the competitor */,
  "review_score" REAL /* Average review score of the competitor */,
  "special_offers" TEXT /* Special offers or promotions by the competitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("competitor_id")
)
